address: River Road Medical Plaza, Point Pleasant, NJ
desc: 6,200 sq.ft. office building with 4 suites at River Road Medical Plaza near Rt. 70. Suite #2 occupied by a dentist; 3 suites vacant — suitable for medical, legal, or accountant offices. 32 shared parking spaces.
description:
6,200 sq.ft. professional office building at River Road Medical Plaza in Point Pleasant, conveniently located near Route 70. The building features four suites — Suite #2 is currently occupied by an established dental practice, with the remaining three suites vacant and ready for new tenants.

Suites are well-suited for medical, legal, accounting, or other professional office uses. The building shares 32 parking spaces with the plaza.
